---
title: "Color Palette, Typography & CSS Tokens"
description: "Official design tokens, colors, fonts, and CSS variables for Rashid Lab projects"
---

This page is the canonical specification for the Rashid Lab visual system,
mirroring the [`_tokens.scss`][site-tokens] that powers
[naimurashid.github.io](https://naimurashid.github.io). New projects should
import or copy these tokens rather than redefining them.

[site-tokens]: https://github.com/naimurashid/naimurashid.github.io/blob/master/_sass/custom/_tokens.scss

::: {.callout-note}
## Migration note (April 2026)

The token system was unified in April 2026. Older docs and templates may
still reference `--unc-*` / `--color-*` variables, Inter / Fira Code fonts,
or the link color `#007FAE`. Those are deprecated. New code uses the
`--rl-*` token namespace, the Archivo + Source Serif 4 + IBM Plex Mono
font stack, and the link color `var(--rl-link)` (`#2E6A9F`).
:::

## Brand Palette

Three brand hex values anchor the system. Everything else is a semantic
alias built on top.

<div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 1rem 0;">
<div style="background: #13294B; color: white; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 6px; text-align: center; min-width: 140px;">
<strong>Navy</strong><br>#13294B
</div>
<div style="background: #4B9CD3; color: white; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 6px; text-align: center; min-width: 140px;">
<strong>Carolina</strong><br>#4B9CD3
</div>
<div style="background: #2E6A9F; color: white; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 6px; text-align: center; min-width: 140px;">
<strong>Carolina-deep</strong><br>#2E6A9F
</div>
</div>

| Token | Hex | Role |
|-------|-----|------|
| `--rl-navy` | `#13294B` | Primary ink, headings, links on light bg |
| `--rl-navy-deep` | `#0B1D3A` | Pressed / active state |
| `--rl-carolina` | `#4B9CD3` | Accent, interactive hover |
| `--rl-carolina-deep` | `#2E6A9F` | Default link color |

## Surfaces & Neutrals

| Token | Hex | Role |
|-------|-----|------|
| `--rl-paper` | `#FFFFFF` | Page background, light mode |
| `--rl-fog` | `#F4F6F8` | Subtle section tint |
| `--rl-mist` | `#E6EAEF` | Hairline dividers, card borders |
| `--rl-graphite` | `#5B6670` | Muted body text, metadata |
| `--rl-ink` | `#1A202C` | Primary body text |

## Semantic Aliases

These are the names you use in components. They map to the brand/neutral
hexes above and are the only color tokens that change in dark mode.

| Alias | Light value | Dark value |
|-------|-------------|------------|
| `--rl-bg` | `var(--rl-paper)` | `#0F1720` |
| `--rl-bg-subtle` | `var(--rl-fog)` | `#17202B` |
| `--rl-text` | `var(--rl-ink)` | `#E2E8F0` |
| `--rl-text-muted` | `var(--rl-graphite)` | `#94A3B8` |
| `--rl-heading` | `var(--rl-navy)` | `#E2E8F0` |
| `--rl-link` | `var(--rl-carolina-deep)` | `#8AB8DB` |
| `--rl-link-hover` | `var(--rl-navy)` | `#B8D4E8` |
| `--rl-border` | `var(--rl-mist)` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)` |
| `--rl-border-strong` | `#CED4DA` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14)` |
| `--rl-accent` | `var(--rl-carolina)` | `#8AB8DB` |

## Typography

The lab uses a **three-font system**: a sans for body and UI, a serif for
headings, and a monospace for metadata, dates, and code.

| Token | Family | Use |
|-------|--------|-----|
| `--rl-font-sans` | Archivo, system fallbacks | Body text, UI, lab interests |
| `--rl-font-serif` | Source Serif 4, Source Serif Pro, Georgia | Headings, lede paragraphs, titles |
| `--rl-font-mono` | IBM Plex Mono, ui-monospace, Menlo | Dates, code, metadata eyebrows |

### Type scale

| Token | Size | Use |
|-------|------|-----|
| `--rl-text-xs` | 12px | Micro-metadata only |
| `--rl-text-sm` | 14px | Metadata, captions |
| `--rl-text-base` | 16px | Body |
| `--rl-text-md` | 18px | Lede, callouts |
| `--rl-text-lg` | 22px | h3 |
| `--rl-text-xl` | 28px | h2 |
| `--rl-text-2xl` | 36px | h1 |

### Line height

| Token | Value | Use |
|-------|-------|-----|
| `--rl-leading-tight` | 1.25 | Headings |
| `--rl-leading-normal` | 1.55 | Body |
| `--rl-leading-loose` | 1.7 | Lede, callouts that breathe |

## Spacing Scale

| Token | rem | px | Common use |
|-------|-----|----|--|
| `--rl-space-1` | 0.25 | 4 | Hairline gaps |
| `--rl-space-2` | 0.5 | 8 | Eyebrow ↔ title |
| `--rl-space-3` | 0.75 | 12 | Title ↔ body |
| `--rl-space-4` | 1.0 | 16 | Paragraph spacing |
| `--rl-space-5` | 1.5 | 24 | Card padding, section breaks |
| `--rl-space-6` | 2.0 | 32 | Major sections |
| `--rl-space-7` | 3.0 | 48 | Page padding, hero ↔ next section |

## Radius & Shadow

Tight, academic register. No pill stuntwork, no decorative drop shadows.

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--rl-radius-sm` | 3px |
| `--rl-radius-md` | 6px |
| `--rl-radius-lg` | 10px |
| `--rl-shadow-none` | `none` |
| `--rl-shadow-sm` | `0 1px 2px rgba(19, 41, 75, 0.06)` |
| `--rl-shadow-md` | `0 1px 3px rgba(19, 41, 75, 0.08)` |

## CSS Custom Properties

Drop this `:root` block into any project that doesn't pull from the
canonical [`_tokens.scss`][site-tokens]. Both forms produce the same
runtime values.

```css
:root {
  /* Brand palette */
  --rl-navy:          #13294B;
  --rl-navy-deep:     #0B1D3A;
  --rl-carolina:      #4B9CD3;
  --rl-carolina-deep: #2E6A9F;

  /* Surfaces & neutrals */
  --rl-paper:    #FFFFFF;
  --rl-fog:      #F4F6F8;
  --rl-mist:     #E6EAEF;
  --rl-graphite: #5B6670;
  --rl-ink:      #1A202C;

  /* Semantic aliases */
  --rl-bg:            var(--rl-paper);
  --rl-bg-subtle:     var(--rl-fog);
  --rl-text:          var(--rl-ink);
  --rl-text-muted:    var(--rl-graphite);
  --rl-heading:       var(--rl-navy);
  --rl-link:          var(--rl-carolina-deep);
  --rl-link-hover:    var(--rl-navy);
  --rl-border:        var(--rl-mist);
  --rl-border-strong: #CED4DA;
  --rl-accent:        var(--rl-carolina);

  /* Radius / shadow */
  --rl-radius-sm: 3px;
  --rl-radius-md: 6px;
  --rl-radius-lg: 10px;
  --rl-shadow-none: none;
  --rl-shadow-sm:   0 1px 2px rgba(19, 41, 75, 0.06);
  --rl-shadow-md:   0 1px 3px rgba(19, 41, 75, 0.08);

  /* Spacing scale */
  --rl-space-1: 0.25rem;
  --rl-space-2: 0.5rem;
  --rl-space-3: 0.75rem;
  --rl-space-4: 1rem;
  --rl-space-5: 1.5rem;
  --rl-space-6: 2rem;
  --rl-space-7: 3rem;

  /* Typography */
  --rl-font-sans:  "Archivo", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  --rl-font-serif: "Source Serif 4", "Source Serif Pro", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
  --rl-font-mono:  "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
  --rl-text-xs:    0.75rem;
  --rl-text-sm:    0.875rem;
  --rl-text-base:  1rem;
  --rl-text-md:    1.125rem;
  --rl-text-lg:    1.375rem;
  --rl-text-xl:    1.75rem;
  --rl-text-2xl:   2.25rem;
  --rl-leading-tight:  1.25;
  --rl-leading-normal: 1.55;
  --rl-leading-loose:  1.7;
}

/* Dark-mode pairs — only the semantic aliases swap. */
html[data-theme="dark"] {
  --rl-bg:            #0F1720;
  --rl-bg-subtle:     #17202B;
  --rl-text:          #E2E8F0;
  --rl-text-muted:    #94A3B8;
  --rl-heading:       #E2E8F0;
  --rl-link:          #8AB8DB;
  --rl-link-hover:    #B8D4E8;
  --rl-border:        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  --rl-border-strong: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  --rl-accent:        #8AB8DB;
  --rl-shadow-sm:     0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
  --rl-shadow-md:     0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}
```

## SCSS Variants

For Quarto projects using the Bootstrap pipeline, map the brand tokens to
Bootstrap variables in `_variables.scss`:

```scss
// _variables.scss

// Brand palette
$rl-navy:          #13294B;
$rl-navy-deep:     #0B1D3A;
$rl-carolina:      #4B9CD3;
$rl-carolina-deep: #2E6A9F;

// Bootstrap mapping
$primary:    $rl-carolina;
$secondary:  $rl-navy;
$body-color: #1A202C;        // --rl-ink
$body-bg:    #FFFFFF;        // --rl-paper
$link-color: $rl-carolina-deep;

// Typography
$font-family-sans-serif: "Archivo", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
$font-family-serif:      "Source Serif 4", "Source Serif Pro", Georgia, serif;
$font-family-monospace:  "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
$headings-font-family:   $font-family-serif;
$headings-font-weight:   600;
$headings-color:         $rl-navy;
```

## Google Fonts URL

The font stack loads from Google Fonts. Add this `<link>` to any project:

```html
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap">
```

## R Color Palette

For ggplot2 and other R visualizations. Color names match the token system.

```r
# Define Rashid Lab palette
rashidlab_colors <- c(
  navy           = "#13294B",
  navy_deep      = "#0B1D3A",
  carolina       = "#4B9CD3",
  carolina_deep  = "#2E6A9F",
  graphite       = "#5B6670",
  ink            = "#1A202C",
  fog            = "#F4F6F8",
  mist           = "#E6EAEF"
)

# Discrete scales
scale_color_rashidlab <- function(...) {
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = unname(rashidlab_colors), ...)
}

scale_fill_rashidlab <- function(...) {
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = unname(rashidlab_colors), ...)
}

# Example
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, color = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#4B9CD3", "#2E6A9F", "#13294B")) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Archivo") +
  theme(
    text = element_text(color = "#1A202C"),
    plot.title = element_text(family = "Source Serif 4", color = "#13294B", face = "bold")
  )
```

## Data Visualization Guidelines

### Categorical (≤5 categories)

```r
# 3-category — Carolina trio
cat3 <- c("#4B9CD3", "#2E6A9F", "#13294B")

# 5-category — adds graphite + a warmer accent
cat5 <- c("#4B9CD3", "#2E6A9F", "#13294B", "#5B6670", "#C48A1A")
```

### Sequential

```r
# Light to dark blue (single-hue ramp)
scale_fill_gradient(low = "#E6EAEF", high = "#13294B")

# Or use viridis for accessibility
scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D")
```

### Diverging (around a meaningful zero)

```r
scale_fill_gradient2(
  low  = "#C75050",   # Subdued red
  mid  = "#F4F6F8",   # rl-fog
  high = "#2E6A9F",   # rl-carolina-deep
  midpoint = 0
)
```

## Accessibility

| Foreground | Background | Ratio | WCAG |
|------------|------------|-------|------|
| Navy (`#13294B`) | White | 13.5:1 | AAA |
| Ink (`#1A202C`) | White | 16.0:1 | AAA |
| Graphite (`#5B6670`) | White | 5.6:1 | AA |
| Carolina-deep (`#2E6A9F`) | White | 5.4:1 | AA |
| Carolina (`#4B9CD3`) | White | 3.2:1 | AA Large only |
| White | Navy (`#13294B`) | 13.5:1 | AAA |

**Use:**

- **Navy or ink** for body text and headings (passes AAA on white).
- **Graphite** for muted/secondary text (passes AA).
- **Carolina-deep** for links (passes AA on white; was `#007FAE` previously, very close ratios).
- **Carolina** only at 18px+ or for non-text accents (3.2:1 fails AA below large text).

## Visual Register

Beyond colors and fonts, the lab system has a consistent design grammar:

- **Hairline borders** — `1px solid var(--rl-border)`. No 2–4px decorative stripes.
- **Restrained shadows** — `--rl-shadow-sm` or none. No `0 8px 20px` lift effects.
- **No gradients** — `linear-gradient`, radial gradients, and decorative tints are out.
- **No hover translateY lifts** — links underline, cards transition borders/shadows only.
- **Mono eyebrows for metadata** — dates, labels, status text in `var(--rl-font-mono)` 12px uppercase with 0.08em letter-spacing.
- **Serif for headings** — `var(--rl-font-serif)` for h1/h2/h3 anchors the academic register.
